The '''ambush at Alderaan''' in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] saw the [[Zsinj's Empire|forces]] of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] destroy a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] in [[the Graveyard]].

Tipped off by [[Ysanne Isard]], Zsinj took his [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] and an escort, the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] ''[[Termagant]]'', to [[the Graveyard]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], to intercept the convoy which was awaiting an escort by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. Unknown to Isard, her ambitious subordinate [[Kirtan Loor]] had sent a dozen [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] in Rogue Squadron colors to capture the convoy and enrich himself with the immensely valuable bacta. Eager for revenge against the Rogues, Zsinj destroyed Loor's squadron and wiped out all the ships in the convoy other than the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'', which had secretly slipped away to the [[Alderaan Biotics]] facility on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]].

Just as the ''Iron Fist'' jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the genuine Rogue Squadron, led by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] arrived and found the convoy wiped out. The Rogues quickly targeted the ''[[Termagant]]'' with a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] salvo aimed at one of its modular connection points. This weak spot in the cruiser's hull allowed the twenty-two torpedoes to destroy it, and the Rogues moved on to the two squadrons of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. Most of the TIEs were shot down by the Rogues, and the remaining fighters fled into the Graveyard, presumably hoping that Zsinj would return to retrieve them. Two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] which had observed the battle quickly escaped to hyperspace, and the Rogues were left to return to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] without the much-needed supply of bacta.

As a result of the battle, the [[New Republic Provisional Council|Provisional Council]] soon authorized a [[Solo Fleet|task force]] under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] with one single objective: eliminate the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']].
